section1.title: Engineering Excellence
section1.body: Delivering world-class engineering solutions with precision, innovation, and commitment to excellence.

section2.title: Our Stats
section2.body: Proven track record of excellence and client satisfaction.

section3.title: Quality Assurance
section3.body: Every project executed by Okochris Engineering Limited is governed by a quality plan that defines inspection and test requirements, hold points, release criteria, and documentation standards.

section4.title: Quality Standards
section4.body: ISO-compliant quality management systems with inspection and test requirements at every stage.

section5.title: Core Values
section5.body: Non-negotiable principles governing every decision, conversation, and project execution.

items.title: Integrity
items.body: We are honest about what we can deliver, transparent when challenges arise, and consistent in doing what we say we will do. Integrity is the foundation of every relationship we hold, whether with clients, partners, host communities, or our own team members.

items.title: Innovation
items.body: The most effective engineering solutions are not always the most obvious ones. We invest in finding better methods, smarter processes, and more efficient approaches to the challenges our clients face, because in engineering, how you deliver is as important as whether you deliver.

items.title: Resilience
items.body: Nigeria's operating environment is complex. Supply chains can be unpredictable, site conditions can change, and project timelines face real-world pressure. Our team is trained and conditioned to solve problems, maintain quality under pressure, and deliver results regardless of the obstacles.

items.title: Leadership
items.body: We lead through the quality of our work, the clarity of our communication, and the accountability of our people. Leadership at Okochris is not a title; it is a standard of conduct that we expect from every member of the team on every site, every day.

section6.title: Engineering Services
section6.body: Comprehensive engineering solutions for your business needs.

items.title: Surface Treatment
items.body: Advanced surface treatment and coating services.

items.title: Equipment Fabrication
items.body: Custom equipment fabrication and installation.

section7.title: Our Vision
section7.body: To be the customer's delight, operating in a quality, profitable, and responsible manner. Providing exclusive services that give customers confidence and pride — a certificate lift.

section1.title: About OKOCHRIS Engineering
section1.body: We are an ISO-certified engineering company delivering top-tier mechanical and civil engineering services to international standards. Built on integrity, innovation, and a relentless commitment to quality.

section2.title: Who We Are
section2.body: Okochris Engineering Limited is a Nigerian-based mechanical and civil engineering company specializing in the design, fabrication, installation, and maintenance of industrial systems. We serve clients across the oil & gas, cement, power, and manufacturing sectors, delivering projects that meet the highest international standards for quality, safety, and performance.

section3.title: Our Vision
section3.body: To be the customer's delight, operating in a quality, profitable, and responsible manner.

section4.title: Our Mission
section4.body: Providing exclusive services that give customers confidence and pride — a certificate lift.

section5.title: Core Values

section1.title: Engineering Services
section1.body: Comprehensive mechanical and civil engineering solutions for industrial facilities across Nigeria.

section2.title: Our Services
section2.body: Complete engineering solutions from design to commissioning

items.title: Piping & Pipeline Installation
items.body: Design, fabrication, construction and installation of process piping and pipeline systems for oil and gas and petrochemical facilities. Competent in interpretation of isometric drawings, weld procedure qualification, NDT coordination, pressure testing, and final documentation handover.

items.title: Mechanical Structures
items.body: Fabrication and installation of steel structures including pipe racks, gallery structures, equipment frameworks, and structural supports. Delivering structural scopes that meet dimensional accuracy, load-bearing, and surface treatment specifications.

items.title: Surface Treatment
items.body: Sandblasting, painting, and coating services for industrial equipment and structures. Our surface treatment work meets NACE and SSPC standards, ensuring long-term corrosion protection and equipment longevity.

items.title: Equipment Fabrication & Assembly
items.body: Custom fabrication of industrial equipment including tanks, vessels, skids, and process equipment. We work with carbon steel, stainless steel, and specialized alloys to deliver equipment that meets client specifications.

items.title: Maintenance & Shutdown
items.body: Planned maintenance and turnaround services for industrial facilities. We provide skilled manpower and project management for scheduled shutdowns, ensuring minimal downtime and maximum efficiency.

items.title: Equipment Leasing
items.body: Short-term and long-term leasing of construction and industrial equipment including welding machines, generators, compressors, and lifting equipment. Flexible rental terms with technical support included.

items.title: Manpower Supply
items.body: Provision of skilled technical manpower for industrial projects including welders, fitters, riggers, and specialized technicians. All personnel are certified and experienced in their respective fields.

section1.title: Get In Touch
section1.body: Have a project in mind? Let's discuss how we can deliver international-standard engineering services for your facility.
